economic_notes: Operations include Gaming Commission (VLTs, convenience store, gas bar), Commercial Fisheries (two lobster vessels, three lobster licences), and Webster Farms Limited (agricultural enterprise). COVID-19 caused closure of gaming operations near year-end; operations resumed at limited capacity. Webster Farms Limited is a GBE accounted for on modified equity basis.
notes: Prior period restatement made to correct error in amortization of fair value increment on Webster Farms Limited acquisition; 2019 comparatives restated. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: 2501745 Nova Scotia Limited, AVFN Development Group GP Ltd., AVFN Forestry Group Limited Partnership. One GBE (Webster Farms Limited / WFL Holdings Limited) on modified equity basis, recorded a loss of $370,104. No schedule of remuneration included in financial statements. expenses_enterprises estimated as Gaming Commission + Commercial Fisheries segment expenses ($4,360,838 + $1,526,980 - $1,065 rounding = $5,887,818 approximately). Social housing expenses taken from income statement line. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event impacting gaming and commercial operations.
